item.text: I’ll inspect the working-tree diff and relevant surrounding code, then use only non-test static checks as needed. I will not run the test suite.

item.text: The change routes explicit HTML `id` values into TOC anchors and excludes those headings from generated-slug deduplication. I’m tracing parser edge cases and how the existing anchor formatter handles escaping and duplicate instances.

item.command: /bin/zsh -lc "sed -n '1,180p' lib/get-html-headers.js; sed -n '1,180p' lib/transform.js; sed -n '1,220p' lib/anchor.js 2>/dev/null || true; sed -n '1,160p' test/fixtures/readme-with-html-id.md; rg \"get-html-headers|countHeaders|addAnchor|\\.id\" lib test -n"

/bin/zsh -lc "sed -n '1,180p' lib/get-html-headers.js; sed -n '1,180p' lib/transform.js; sed -n '1,220p' lib/anchor.js 2>/dev/null || true; sed -n '1,160p' test/fixtures/readme-with-html-id.md; rg \"get-html-headers|countHeaders|addAnchor|\\.id\" lib test -n"

/bin/zsh -lc "sed -n '180,240p' lib/transform.js; node -e \"var a=require('anchor-markdown-header'); console.log(require.resolve('anchor-markdown-header')); console.log(a('x] y','github.com',0))\"; sed -n '1,220p' node_modules/anchor-markdown-header/anchor-markdown-header.js 2>/dev/null || rg \"function anchor|module.exports\" node_modules/anchor-markdown-header -n; git diff --check"

/bin/zsh -lc "sed -n '180,240p' lib/transform.js; node -e \"var a=require('anchor-markdown-header'); console.log(require.resolve('anchor-markdown-header')); console.log(a('x] y','github.com',0))\"; sed -n '1,220p' node_modules/anchor-markdown-header/anchor-markdown-header.js 2>/dev/null || rg \"function anchor|module.exports\" node_modules/anchor-markdown-header -n; git diff --check"
